ul.li:
Include these codes as defined in https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
CodeDisplay
EmCare.B14S2.DE10Possible Serious Abscess - Hot Tender Swelling
EmCare.B14S2.DE11Cellulitis - Red Tender Skin
EmCare.B14S2.DE12Papular Itching Rash(Prurigo) - Itching rash with small papules and scratch marks. Dark spots with pale centre
EmCare.B14S2.DE13Ringworm (Tinea) - An itchy circular lesion with a raised edge and fine scaly area in the centre with loss of hair. May also be found on body or web on feet
EmCare.B14S2.DE14Scabies - Rash and excoriations on torso; burrows in web space and wrists, face spared
EmCare.B14S2.DE15Chickenpox - Vesicles over body. Vesicles appear progressively over days and form scabs after they rupture
EmCare.B14S2.DE16Herpes Zoster - Vesicles in one area on one side of body with intense pain or scars plus shooting pain. Uncommon in children except where they are immuno-compromised (e.g. if infected with HIV)
EmCare.B14S2.DE17Impetigo / Folliculitis - Red, Tender, Warm Crusts or Small lesions

title.value: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth

description.value: Codes representing possible values for the Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth element

display.value: Possible Serious Abscess - Hot Tender Swelling

value.value: The client has a possible serious abscess - Hot tender swelling
The client has Cellulitis - Red tender skin

display.value: Papular Itching Rash(Prurigo) - Itching rash with small papules and scratch marks. Dark spots with pale centre

value.value: The client has Papular Itching Rash(Prurigo) - itching rash with small papules and scratch marks. Dark spots with pale centre

display.value: Ringworm (Tinea) - An itchy circular lesion with a raised edge and fine scaly area in the centre with loss of hair. May also be found on body or web on feet

value.value: The client has Ringworm (Tinea) - An itchy circular lesion with a raised edge and fine scaly area in the centre with loss of hair. May also be found on body or web on feet

display.value: Scabies - Rash and excoriations on torso; burrows in web space and wrists, face spared

value.value: The client has Scabies - Rash and excoriations on torso; burrows in web space and wrists, face spared

display.value: Chickenpox - Vesicles over body. Vesicles appear progressively over days and form scabs after they rupture

value.value: The client has Chickenpox - Vesicles over body. Vesicles appear progressively over days and form scabs after they rupture

display.value: Herpes Zoster - Vesicles in one area on one side of body with intense pain or scars plus shooting pain. Uncommon in children except where they are immuno-compromised (e.g. if infected with HIV)

value.value: The client has Herpes Zoster - Vesicles in one area on one side of body with intense pain or scars plus shooting pain. Uncommon in children except where they are immuno-compromised (e.g. if infected with HIV)

display.value: Impetigo / Folliculitis - Red, Tender, Warm Crusts or Small lesions

value.value: The client has Impetigo / Folliculitis - Red, Tender, Warm Crusts or Small lesions
